{{Infobox character
| name = Maten twins
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Wintersteel (novel)|Wintersteel]]
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Maten twins]] were covering [[Lindon]]'s team's retreat.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c13">''Wintersteel'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|One of the [[Maten twins]] was covered in burns.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c19">''Wintersteel'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Maten twins]] need support.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28">''Wintersteel'', chapter 28</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
